case_title: TERESA TONG VS. MARCO ANTONIO UICABCANUL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG, TERESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO $3,521.91 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,586.91, BASED ON THE EVIDENCE, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT VIOLATED CVC SECTION 22107. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2021 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,521.91 FILED BY TONG, TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR INTERPRETERS FOR BOTH PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETERS TO SEP-30-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TERESA TONG IS PRESENT AND REQUESTS A CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT MARCO ANTONIO UICABCANUL IS PRESENT AND REQUESTS A SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0522103D002, TAG # 036802 BY DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TERESA TONG IS PRESENT ASSITED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. DEFENDANT MARCO ANTONIO UICAB CANUL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ AND WITH WITNESS FREDDIE VARGAS. PRIOR TO THE HEARING THE COURT CONFIRMED WITH PARTIES THAT THE PLAINTIFF AND THE JUDGE ARE NO RELATION THOUGH THEY SHARE THE SAME LAST NAME. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF TERESA TONG, RE: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT UICABCANUL, MARCO ANTONIO
